task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into the Ekylibre application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Ekylibre dashboard or web interface loaded in a browser, indicating a successful login (e.g., user profile or admin menu visible).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the livestock or bovine management section of the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays a list of animals, herd data, or an active navigation menu highlighting livestock, animals, or bovines.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent identified and selected the 5 oldest bovines for the exit process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list of animals sorted by birth date (oldest first) with 5 animals selected (e.g., via checkboxes), or a batch processing screen explicitly listing 5 older animals.

task_completion.description: Verify the exit date is set to 2024-03-01 and the exit reason is set to 'abattage' (slaughter).
task_completion.visual_evidence: An animal exit form or batch processing modal showing the date field filled with '2024-03-01' and the reason dropdown or field set to 'abattage' (or 'slaughter').

task_completion.description: Verify the agent created a consolidated sale invoice (revenue documentation) for the exited batch.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sales invoice creation screen, accounting entry, or confirmation page within Ekylibre showing a sale or revenue document being generated for the slaughtered animals.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Ekylibre web interface rather than terminal commands or scripts to manipulate the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Ekylibre UI. There should be no terminal windows running SQL commands, curl, or automated scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the invoice was created within the Ekylibre application and not mocked up in an external tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The invoice creation process must occur within the Ekylibre web interface, displaying standard Ekylibre menus, styling, and form layouts, rather than a text editor or spreadsheet application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent navigated through the necessary forms to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of intermediate form-filling steps (selecting animals, entering dates/reasons) rather than just jumping directly to a 'success' URL or manually editing the URL to trigger actions without filling forms.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must log into Ekylibre at http://demo.ekylibre.farm:3000 using admin@ekylibre.org / 12345678. The task requires recording the exit of exactly 5 bovines. The exited animals must be the oldest in the herd (born before 2010). The exit date must be explicitly set to '2024-03-01'. The exit reason must be 'abattage' (slaughter). Finally, a consolidated sale invoice must be created for these 5 animals.
